seo.title: AI Workshop for Business Leaders | SSW
seo.description: A 1-day workshop for CEOs and decision makers. Discover the custom software, modernised systems, and SaaS savings AI now makes affordable — done the right way.

blocks.heading: Build the things you've **always wanted** — now affordable
blocks.description:
All the things you've always wanted in your business but couldn't justify building — custom software, modernised legacy systems, fewer SaaS bills — are now affordable.\
A hands-on day for CEOs and decision makers to map what AI can unlock for your business, done the right way.

blocks.heading: Why Your Software Roadmap Stalls
blocks.body:
The list of things you'd love to build keeps growing. Custom tools, smarter systems, an upgrade for that ancient CRM. They never quite make the budget.

AI changes the maths. Here's where most mid-market businesses get stuck.

cards.heading: Custom software was too expensive to justify
cards.description: The internal tool you've sketched on the whiteboard for years never beats the off-the-shelf option on price — until AI changes the build cost.

cards.heading: Your data isn't in shape
cards.description: AI experiments stall because customer, product, and operational data live in five places. Without the foundations, the AI bets don't pay off.

cards.heading: SaaS bills keep climbing
cards.description: You're paying per seat, per month, per add-on for tools that almost fit. A tailored AI-built alternative is now cheaper to own than to rent.

cards.heading: Adding AI risks breaking what works
cards.description: Your existing software runs the business. Bolting AI on without a plan is how outages happen. Done right, AI features ship safely alongside what already works.

cards.heading: Legacy systems your team has outgrown
cards.description: Your salesperson has been stuck on the same CRM for three years. Replacing it has always been too expensive — until now. AI makes the upgrade affordable.

blocks.heading: A Workshop Built for **Business Outcomes**
blocks.body: Not an AI 101. A working session built around the things you've always wanted in your business but couldn't justify building. Five modules, one focused day, mapped to decisions you can make on Monday.

accordionItems.label: Production-grade vs. vibe-coded — what's safe to build
accordionItems.content: Where AI-generated software is reliable enough to bet on, and where it isn't. Understand the difference between a slick demo and a system you'd put in front of customers.

accordionItems.label: Getting your data ready so AI investments pay off
accordionItems.content: The minimum viable data foundation. What to consolidate, what to ignore, and how to stop AI projects from stalling on messy inputs.

accordionItems.label: Replacing SaaS sprawl with tailored, AI-built tools
accordionItems.content: How to identify which SaaS subscriptions are good candidates to replace with software tailored to your business — and what the new cost structure actually looks like.

accordionItems.label: Adding AI to existing software without breaking it
accordionItems.content: Patterns for layering AI features onto the systems that already run your business, safely. What to pilot, what to roll out, and how to avoid the failure modes everyone else hits.

accordionItems.label: Modernising legacy systems affordably
accordionItems.content: The CRM-stuck-for-three-years problem, and others like it. How AI changes the economics of replacing legacy systems your team has outgrown — with a working framework you'll apply to your own.

accordionItems.label: ✨ Post-Workshop Support
accordionItems.content: Follow-up sessions and a prioritised opportunity list to turn the day's decisions into a costed plan your team can execute.

blocks.heading: At a Glance
blocks.description: A one-day, on-site workshop for the people who own the budget. Built around your business, not generic AI theory.

features.heading: $5,200 + GST
features.description: Flat rate for up to 20 participants

features.heading: Worked through your real systems
features.description: We use your data, tools, and CRM — not slides

features.heading: A roadmap you can act on Monday
Tailored to your business
features.description: Mapped to your stack, your data, your goals

cards.heading: 1️⃣ Discovery call
cards.description: A short call to understand your business, the systems holding you back, and the ideas you've parked for years. We tailor the day around them.

cards.heading: 2️⃣ On-Site Workshop Day
cards.description: One focused day at your office with your decision makers. We work through your real systems and data, and leave you with a prioritised opportunity list.

cards.heading: 3️⃣ Scope What's Next
cards.description: Follow-up to turn the opportunity list into a costed engagement plan — whether that's a tailored build, a legacy replacement, or AI features for what you already run.

accordionItems.label: Is this for me if I'm not technical?
accordionItems.content: Yes — this workshop is built for CEOs, founders, and budget holders. You don't need to write code or understand AI under the hood. We work in business terms: outcomes, costs, and where AI changes the maths.

accordionItems.label: What's the ROI? How do we measure it?
accordionItems.content: You leave with a prioritised, costed opportunity list — the SaaS bills you could replace, the systems you could upgrade, the custom tools that are now affordable. Each opportunity has an estimated build cost and the saving or revenue it unlocks.

accordionItems.label: How long is the workshop?
accordionItems.content: One focused day on-site at your office. Built for executives who don't have a week to spare.

accordionItems.label: Who should attend?
accordionItems.content: Best with your decision makers in the room — CEO, COO, head of operations or sales — plus one or two senior operators who know where the bodies are buried in your current systems. Cap of around 10 keeps the conversation sharp.

accordionItems.label: What do we walk away with?
accordionItems.content: A prioritised list of opportunities, a costed view of what's worth building first, and a clear next step. No homework, no jargon, no "we'll send a deck."

blocks.heading: Ulysses Maclaren
blocks.description: Uly brings 20+ years of enterprise consulting experience, helping companies adopt emerging technology with confidence. He's led AI sessions for executives looking to cut through the hype and turn AI into measurable business outcomes.

blocks.heading: Built on Real-World AI Delivery
blocks.body: SSW has been building, fixing, and shipping AI-accelerated software for businesses across industries. The opportunities you'll explore in the workshop are grounded in what we've already delivered — not what's possible in theory.

cards.description: SSW's Gert Marx joins Chris Simon at NDC Melbourne to break down Contextive — the open-source tool helping teams build software that aligns with business needs.
Ulysses Maclaren and Richard Campbell on the economics behind AI — why the cost curve is bending, and what that means for the software you can now afford to build.
Ulysses on responsible AI for business: transparency, privacy, and the practical guardrails that keep AI bets safe to roll out.

blocks.heading: Build the things you've **always wanted** — now affordable
